topStories.title: Trump-Xi meeting may be postponed: Beijing denies ‘false reports’, says delay not linked to Strait of Hormuz issue
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump is considering delaying his China visit, initially scheduled for later this month, as conflict escalates in the Middle East. The development comes days after Trump appealed to China and other allies to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: PM Modi speaks to UAE President, stresses on safe navigation through Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: During this call, the two leaders discussed the rising tensions in the West Asian region.

topStories.title: Powell's Litmus Test: Will US Fed Cut Or Hold Amid War-Led Risk Premium?
topStories.description: US Fed Policy: US-Israel-Iran war, now in its third week running, has roiled the policy outlook for US Fed policymakers. The war, that has stranded a fifth of global oil supply, has triggered fresh...

topStories.title: "Weak On Security, Good Thing He's Out": Trump On Top Official's Exit Over Iran
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump said that it was a "good thing" that Joseph Kent,the head of the National Counterterrorism Centre, resigned because he claimed that Iran was not a threat.

topStories.title: Google’s Personal Intelligence feature is expanding to all US users
topStories.description: Personal Intelligence allows Google's AI assistant to tap into your Google ecosystem, such as Gmail and Google Photos, to provide more tailored responses.

topStories.title: Tehran Seizes Hundreds Of Starlink Devices Sent By 'American-Zionist Enemy'
topStories.description: The internet blackout in Iran has now been enforced for over 18 days. Only some users in the country have access to the internet as the war rages.

topStories.title: Stryker says it’s restoring systems after pro-Iran hackers wiped thousands of employee devices
topStories.description: The hack, which brought ongoing widespread disruption to the company's operations, is thought to be the first major cyberattack in the United States in response to the Trump administration's war in Iran.

topStories.title: Chile's president begins building border barrier less than week into term
topStories.description: José Antonio Kast visited the ditch - a few feet wide and deep - on Monday, calling it a "milestone".

dailyNews.title: Day after NDA’s clean sweep in Bihar, Congress MLA says skipped RS poll on State party’s chief’s advice; Rajesh Ram denies claim
dailyNews.description: The Mahagathbandhan joint candidate, Amarendra Dhari Singh, lost the biennial election to the Upper House of Parliament after four MLAs from the Opposition alliance refrained from voting on March 16

dailyNews.title: OpenAI expands government footprint with AWS deal, report says
dailyNews.description: OpenAI has reportedly signed a partnership with AWS to sell its AI systems to the U.S. government for classified and unclassified work, marking an expansion beyond its Pentagon deal last month.

dailyNews.title: Israel, US first be ‘brought to their knees’: Mojtaba Khamenei on ‘right time for peace’ as Iran's Larijani gets killed
dailyNews.description: Israel announced the elimination of Iran's security chief Ali Larijan. An Iranian official revealed that new supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei rejected proposals to ease tensions, insisting the US and Israel must first be subdued before any peace talks.

dailyNews.description: Kent, who advised Trump and national intelligence director on 'terror' threats, says Iran 'posed no imminent threat'.

dailyNews.title: Nancy Guthrie update: Retired K9 officer says decision not to use cadaver dogs ‘defies logic’
dailyNews.description: Retired K9 expert questions why cadaver dogs aren't being used in Nancy Guthrie case as investigation enters seventh week with few concrete answers.

dailyNews.title: Apple News fails to provide balanced coverage of DHS shutdown, ignores right-leaning outlets: study
dailyNews.description: Apple News and other prominent aggregators are failing to provide balanced coverage of the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) shutdown, according to a study.

dailyNews.title: Oregon star Dante Moore writes letter to governor advocating for access to mental health services
dailyNews.description: Oregon Ducks quarterback Dante Moore opened up about his battle with depression and advocated for mental health resources in a letter he sent to Oregon Gov. Tina Kotek.

dailyNews.title: Austin mass shooting suspect avoided felony in 2022 case, misdemeanor later dismissed after plea deal: docs
dailyNews.description: Austin terror suspect previously faced felony hit-and-run charge that was dismissed. New details emerge about gunman's criminal history.

dailyNews.title: Cleanest cruise ships uncovered as new CDC data sparks debate
dailyNews.description: The Fox News Lifestyle Newsletter brings you trending stories on family, travel, food, neighbors helping neighbors, pets, autos, military veterans, heroes, faith and American values.

dailyNews.title: Ex-NHL star rips Rangers organization for hosting pride night
dailyNews.description: Former New York Rangers star Ron Duguay ripped the organization for hosting a pride night in messages posted on X. At least one was deleted.

dailyNews.title: Joe Kent, a Top Counterterrorism Official for the Trump Administration, Resigns, Citing Iran War
dailyNews.description: Mr. Kent is the highest-ranking Trump administration official to quit in opposition to the conflict. He said pressure from Israel had pushed the president into war against Iran.

dailyNews.title: What’s in Trump’s SAVE Act, the Voter ID Bill Republicans Are Pushing?
dailyNews.description: The legislation would require voters to prove their citizenship in person upon registration, ban IDs without a photo at polling places and criminalize failures to enforce such requirements.

dailyNews.title: M.T.A. Sues Trump Administration to Release 2nd Avenue Subway Funding
dailyNews.description: New York transit officials are seeking nearly $60 million in overdue federal funding to extend the subway line to East Harlem. The administration’s rationale for the freeze has been inconsistent.

dailyNews.title: Trump Officials Weigh New Plan to Stop Offshore Wind Farms
dailyNews.description: Proposed settlements would block wind farms off New York State and North Carolina, according to documents reviewed by The New York Times.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Gutting of Election Security Fuels Worries for Midterms
dailyNews.description: Officials say the crippling of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency, which the president himself created, could open elections to cyberattacks and foreign influence.

dailyNews.title: Trump Signals He May Intervene in Cuba Following Iran and Venezuela
dailyNews.description: Still at war with Iran and in control in Venezuela, President Trump is signaling that he is about to intervene in another country.

dailyNews.title: Chief Justice: Personal attacks on judges are "dangerous and it's got to stop"
dailyNews.description: President Trump has slammed the Supreme Court justices who voted to strike down most of his tariffs, claiming they "openly disrespect the Presidents who nominate them."

dailyNews.title: Israel targets more Iran leaders as allies reject Trump's calls for help
dailyNews.description: Israel says it killed Iran's top security official Ali Larijani, as America's European allies reject President Trump's demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump says China trip will be delayed because of Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Tuesday that China is "fine" with a delay.

dailyNews.title: Trump slams NATO allies over Strait of Hormuz in Oval Office meeting with Ireland's leader
dailyNews.description: President Trump reiterated his frustration with NATO allies on Tuesday while speaking to reporters in the Oval Office with Ireland's leader, Micheál Martin. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi has more.

dailyNews.title: Top Trump counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump's director of the National Counterterrorism Center, Joe Kent, announced his immediate resignation Tuesday, citing the administration's decision to intervene in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump participates in the Friends of Ireland Luncheon
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as President Trump delivers remarks at the Friends of Ireland Luncheon for St. Patrick's Day.
